data.name: Error_invalid_AirSlide_parent
data.value: The specified AirSlide parent is invalid.

data.name: Error_invalid_Air_parent
data.value: The specified Air parent is invalid.

data.name: Error_soflanArea_has_no_tail
data.value: The SoflanArea is missing a tail.

data.name: Error_hold_has_no_tail
data.value: The Hold is missing a tail.

data.name: Error_BPM_change_event_not_found_at_0
data.value: No BPM change event was found at tick 0.

data.name: Diag_time_Signature_event_not_found_at_0
data.value: No Time Signature event was found at bar 0. Defaulting to a 4/4 time signature.

data.name: Diag_main_timeline_not_found
data.value: The main TIL {0} was not found. A new TIL with an initial speed of 1.0 has been created.

data.name: Diag_note_overlapped_in_different_TIL
data.value: The note overlaps with note in other TILs. This may cause problems in the scroll speed of this note.

data.name: Error_no_negative_timeline_event
data.value: Scroll speed change events must have a non-negative TIL value.

data.name: Error_note_must_have_non_negative_timeline
data.value: Note must have a non-negative TIL value.

data.name: Error_air_parent_null
data.value: Parent of Air cannot be null.

data.name: Error_air_slide_parent_null
data.value: Parent of AirSlide cannot be null.

data.name: Diag_set_length_smaller_than_unit
data.value: Try to set the length of this note to {0}, but it has been constrained to the minimum value of {1}. This might be due to nodes in the original note having spacing less than {1}.

data.name: Diag_concurrent_ex_effects
data.value: Different EX effects coexist at the tick {0}: {1}. The game may only display one of these.

data.name: Diag_AirCrush_min_density_but_end_Control
data.value: The converted Crush has a minimum density of {0}. However, the original End of Crash is Control, resulting in the End actually being a Step.
